creator: steve@FreeBSD.org
text:
I won't miss it.  Is the originator of the PR willing to take
over MAINTAINERship of the trafd port? :)  Since both of these
ports are supersets of trafshow is there any need in keeping
it around at all?

-steve

On Sun, Dec 02, 2001 at 04:29:10PM -0800, anders@FreeBSD.ORG wrote:
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->analyzed
> State-Changed-By: anders
> State-Changed-When: Sun Dec 2 16:21:16 PST 2001
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Is anyone going to miss net/bpft?
